title: 5 Best and Worst Performing Health Care Stocks in December 2022
text: Despite inflation making it hard for the healthcare industry to manage its operating costs, there are a few positives that make this sector attractive to investors.

title: Investors Should Watch These 4 Hospital Stocks Despite Headwinds
text: Rising costs amid inflationary pressures are trimming margins for the Zacks Medical-Hospital industry players. Yet, HCA Healthcare (HCA), Universal Health (UHS), Acadia Healthcare (ACHC) and Tenet Healthcare (THC) are poised to win big with improving volumes.

title: These Were the 5 Best and Worst Performing Large-Cap Stocks in Q4 2022
text: The year 2022 proved to be the worst calendar year for the S&P 500 since 2008.
